mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MEMBER ( user_id, password, name, birth_date, email, phone, address, gender ) VALUES ( #{user_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birth_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender, jdbcType=CHAR}
)
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET password = #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender, jdbcType=CHAR}, birth_date = #{birth_date, jdbcType=DATE} WHERE user_id = #{user_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.PLACE_ID , p.PLACE_TYPE , p.NAME , p.ADDRESS , p.IMAGE_URL , p.VIEW_COUNT
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY p.VIEW_COUNT DESC) AS rn FROM PLACE p JOIN FAVORITE f ON p.PLACE_ID = f.PLACE_ID WHERE f.USER_ID = #{user_id} AND p.PLACE_TYPE = #{category} )
WHERE rn <= 3

SELECT
r.reservation_id AS reservationId , p.place_id AS placeId , p.name AS placeName , p.place_type AS placeType
, TO_CHAR(r.check_in, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate
, r.visit_time AS visitTime , r.guest_count AS guestCount , r.status AS status FROM reservation r
JOIN place p ON r.place_id = p.place_id
WHERE r.user_id = #{user_id}
AND r.status IN ('PENDING', 'RESERVED', 'COMPLETED', 'NOSHOW') ORDER BY r.check_in ASC , r.created_at DESC
SELECT INQUIRY_ID , USER_ID , CATEGORY , TITLE , CONTENT , STATUS , ADMIN_REPLY , CREATED_AT , ANSWERED_AT FROM INQUIRY WHERE INQUIRY_ID = #{inquiry_id} AND USER_ID = #{user_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE RESERVATION SET STATUS = 'CANCELLED', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE RESERVATION_ID = #{reservation_id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.RESERVATION_ID , r.USER_ID , r.PLACE_ID , r.CHECK_IN , r.CHECK_OUT , r.VISIT_TIME , r.TICKET_ID , r.GUEST_COUNT , r.REQUEST_NOTE , r.STATUS , r.PAYMENT_ID , r.CREATED_AT , r.UPDATED_AT , p.PLACE_TYPE , p.NAME , p.ADDRESS , p.IMAGE_URL FROM RESERVATION r JOIN PLACE p ON r.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE r.RESERVATION_ID = #{reservation_id} AND r.USER_ID = #{user_id}
